title: Spectrum SBS460CLM 46cm Self-Propelled Cordless Lawn Mower (Tool Only)
description_html:
Spectrum SBS460CLM — The Cordless Mower Built for Real Lawns

If your lawn demands more than a basic push-along can deliver, the Spectrum SBS460CLM is where performance meets practicality. Engineered for medium to large gardens, this self-propelled cordless mower takes the hard work out of lawn care — you guide it, and the transmission does the rest.

At the heart of the SBS460CLM is a high-efficiency brushless motor drawing power from a dual-battery configuration. This twin-battery setup doesn't just extend your runtime — it maintains consistent cutting speed from the first strip to the last, even in thicker grass.

The 46cm (18") metal cutting deck covers ground quickly without compromising finish quality. Seven central cutting heights from 25mm to 75mm let you dial in the perfect cut for the season — scalp-close in spring, or a lush longer finish in the summer heat. Adjustment takes seconds with the single central lever.

When it comes to grass disposal, the SBS460CLM gives you four options: rear collection into the 60-litre grass bag, mulching back into the lawn, rear discharge, or side discharge. A bag-full indicator means no blockages, no guesswork.

Large ball-bearing wheels — 7" front and 10" rear — roll smoothly across uneven ground and resist turf damage. Despite a solid, substantial build, the mower remains well-balanced and manageable throughout your session.

This is a tool-only model. Compatible with optional Spectrum 2Ah and 4Ah batteries. Choose from standard, fast, or dual charger options — all available separately.

metafields.custom.feature_bullets:
• Self-propelled drive — covers more ground with less effort
  • Dual-battery brushless motor for sustained power on large lawns
  • 46cm metal cutting deck for a professional-quality finish
  • 7-stage central height adjustment from 25–75mm
  • 4-in-1: collect, mulch, rear discharge, or side discharge
  • 60-litre grass bag with bag-full indicator
  • Ball-bearing wheels (7" front / 10" rear) for smooth, turf-friendly movement
  • 5-year Spectrum manufacturer's warranty (T&Cs apply)
metafields.custom.bullet_two: Dual-battery brushless motor for sustained power across large lawns
metafields.custom.bullet_three: 4-in-1 grass disposal: collect, mulch, rear or side discharge

title: Spectrum SBS40CB 40V 4.0Ah Lithium-Ion Battery Pack
description_html:
More Power, Longer Runs — Spectrum 40V 4.0Ah Battery

Get the most from your Spectrum cordless tools with the SBS40CB 40V 4.0Ah Lithium-Ion Battery Pack. Built around high-grade 21700 lithium-ion cells, this battery delivers steady, reliable voltage throughout the discharge cycle — no fade, no sudden drop-off, just consistent performance right to the end.

At 4.0Ah, it holds double the capacity of the 2.0Ah option, making it the better choice for larger gardens or longer sessions. Whether you're mowing, trimming, or clearing leaves, the SBS40CB keeps your tools running longer between charges.

The battery is compact and well-balanced at just 900g, with a footprint of 8×9×15cm. It slots into any compatible Spectrum 40V tool without adapters or fuss, and charges with any Spectrum 40V charger — standard, fast, or dual.

Robust construction, thermal protection circuitry, and Spectrum's proven build quality mean this battery is engineered to last season after season.

metafields.custom.feature_bullets:
• 40V 4.0Ah capacity — double the runtime of the 2.0Ah pack
  • 21700 lithium-ion cells for consistent, fade-free power
  • Compact and lightweight at 900g — easy to handle and store
  • Compatible with all Spectrum 40V cordless tools
  • Works with any Spectrum 40V charger (standard, fast, or dual)
  • Built-in thermal protection for safe, reliable long-term use
metafields.custom.bullet_two: 21700 lithium-ion cells deliver consistent, fade-free power to the end of the charge
metafields.custom.bullet_three: Compatible with all Spectrum 40V cordless tools and chargers

title: Spectrum SBSCBC 40V Standard Battery Charger (0.5A)
description_html:
Keep Your Spectrum Battery Ready — Standard 40V Charger

The Spectrum SBSCBC is the no-fuss standard charger for all compatible Spectrum 40V lithium-ion batteries. Plug in after a session, leave it overnight, and your battery will be fully replenished and ready to go again by morning.

With a steady 0.5A output at 40V, the SBSCBC charges at a gentle, battery-friendly rate — ideal if your toolkit runs on a single battery that you want to look after for the long term. Slow overnight charging is widely regarded as the kindest charge cycle for lithium-ion longevity.

The charger is compact at just 8×9×12cm and weighs under 200g, so it tucks away neatly in a drawer, shed shelf, or toolbox. Simple LED indication lets you know when charging is underway and when it's complete.

If faster charging is a priority, consider upgrading to the Spectrum SBSCSC Fast Charger (2A), which cuts charge time to a quarter of the standard rate.

metafields.custom.feature_bullets:
• Compatible with all Spectrum 40V lithium-ion battery packs
  • 0.5A gentle charge rate — ideal for overnight charging and battery longevity
  • Compact design (8×9×12cm) — easy to store in shed, garage, or toolbox
  • LED charge indicator shows charging status at a glance
  • Lightweight at just 170g
metafields.custom.bullet_two: 0.5A gentle charge rate — kind to your battery for long-term health
metafields.custom.bullet_three: Compact and lightweight at 170g — stores neatly anywhere

title: Spectrum SBSCSC 40V Fast Battery Charger (2A)
description_html:
Back in Action in a Fraction of the Time — Spectrum 40V Fast Charger

Don't let a flat battery interrupt your day. The Spectrum SBSCSC Fast Charger delivers a 2A charge at 40V, replenishing your Spectrum lithium-ion battery four times faster than the standard 0.5A model. A 2.0Ah battery can be fully charged in around an hour; a 4.0Ah pack in roughly two.

Compatible with all Spectrum 40V batteries, the SBSCSC is the natural choice if your garden sessions are split across the day or you're running a single battery between multiple tools. Charge during a lunch break, and you're ready for the afternoon.

Despite the faster output, the charger remains compact and practical — just 11×9×17cm and 470g. Built-in charge management circuitry monitors the battery throughout the charge cycle, cutting off automatically at full capacity to protect cell health and prevent overcharging.

For the heaviest users, the Spectrum Dual Charger lets you charge two batteries simultaneously — worth considering if your work demands continuous runtime.

metafields.custom.feature_bullets:
• 2A fast charge — 4× faster than the standard 0.5A charger
  • Charges a 2.0Ah battery in ~1 hour; 4.0Ah in ~2 hours
  • Compatible with all Spectrum 40V lithium-ion battery packs
  • Automatic cut-off at full charge protects battery health
  • Compact (11×9×17cm) and lightweight at 470g
  • Built-in charge management circuitry for safe, stable charging
metafields.custom.bullet_two: 4× faster than standard charging — a 2.0Ah battery fully charged in around an hour
metafields.custom.bullet_three: Automatic cut-off at full charge protects lithium-ion cell health

title: Spectrum SBS480CBV 40V Cordless Leaf Blower Vacuum (Tool Only)
description_html:
Spectrum SBS480CBV — Blow, Vac, Mulch. Garden tidy in minutes.

Autumn leaves, post-mow clippings, damp debris in hard-to-reach corners — the Spectrum SBS480CBV Cordless Blower Vac takes care of it all. One tool, three functions: blower, vacuum, and mulcher. No cables. No compromise.

In blower mode, the SBS480CBV generates an air speed of up to 52m/s with an air volume of 264m³/h — enough to shift stubborn wet leaves from paths, patios, and lawn edges in quick, efficient passes.

Switch to vacuum mode and the air volume jumps to 588m³/h, pulling debris into the 12-litre collection bag while the built-in 3-blade mulching system shreds it at a 30:1 ratio. That means a full bag's worth of leaves compresses down to a fraction of its original volume — fewer trips to the compost heap, more time getting on with the job.

Weighing just 4.26kg with an adjustable handle, the SBS480CBV stays comfortable during longer sessions. A reliable brush motor delivers the consistent airflow you need without the noise and exhaust of a petrol equivalent.

Tool-only model. Compatible with Spectrum 2.0Ah and 4.0Ah batteries and all Spectrum 40V chargers, all available separately.

metafields.custom.feature_bullets:
• 3-in-1: blower, vacuum, and mulcher in a single cordless tool
  • 52m/s air speed in blower mode — clears wet leaves and heavy debris
  • 588m³/h vacuum air volume for fast, efficient collection
  • 30:1 mulching ratio — fills the bag 30× slower than without mulching
  • 12-litre collection bag — manageable size for comfortable carrying
  • Adjustable handle for ergonomic use during longer sessions
  • Lightweight at 4.26kg — significantly less tiring than petrol alternatives
  • 5-year Spectrum manufacturer's warranty (T&Cs apply)
metafields.custom.bullet_two: 3-in-1: blower, vacuum, and mulcher — one tool for the whole garden tidy
metafields.custom.bullet_three: 30:1 mulching ratio means dramatically fewer trips to the compost heap

title: Spectrum SBS240CPHT 40V Cordless Pole Hedge Trimmer, 46cm Blade (Tool Only)
description_html:
Spectrum SBS240CPHT — Reach Further, Cut Cleaner

Tall hedges and high-sided borders are no match for the Spectrum SBS240CPHT Cordless Pole Hedge Trimmer. With a total reach of 2.4 metres and a 180° adjustable cutting head, it handles the angles that ladders and standard trimmers can't — safely, from the ground.

The 46cm dual-action, laser-cut blade runs at 2,600 strokes per minute, slicing through branches up to 18mm thick with clean, precise cuts that promote healthy regrowth. Whether you're trimming horizontally along the top of a hedge or working vertically down the face, the rotating head gives you the position you need without awkward repositioning.

Power comes from Spectrum's 40V lithium-ion battery system. The reliable brush motor maintains consistent cutting speed throughout the charge, and at just 3.62kg the tool stays well-balanced and fatigue-free even on longer hedgerows.

Backed by Spectrum's 5-year manufacturer's warranty, the SBS240CPHT is built to earn its place in your tool shed for years to come.

Tool-only model. Compatible with Spectrum 2.0Ah and 4.0Ah batteries and all Spectrum 40V chargers, available separately.

metafields.custom.feature_bullets:
• 2.4m total reach — trim tall hedges safely from the ground
  • 180° adjustable cutting head for horizontal and vertical trimming
  • 46cm dual-action laser-cut blade for clean, precise cuts
  • 2,600 strokes/min — fast, efficient trimming in fewer passes
  • Cuts branches up to 18mm thick
  • Lightweight at 3.62kg — well-balanced for extended use
  • Compatible with all Spectrum 40V batteries and chargers
  • 5-year Spectrum manufacturer's warranty (T&Cs apply)
metafields.custom.bullet_two: 2.4m reach and 180° adjustable head — trim tall hedges safely from the ground
metafields.custom.bullet_three: 46cm laser-cut blade at 2,600 strokes/min for a fast, clean finish
